review_text:
Special thanks to Margie, Tara and Claudio for making our stay so special 🧡
Great location, great staff and great facilities

Margie in reception was amazing and so friendly❤️ great size site and the pool was wonderful and clean. Amenities clean. Was quiet in April and May❤️ Walk to beach.
Loved our stay❣️

Beautiful surroundings, walking distance to Cable beach safely and with an amazing pool area ... Amenities though could get an upgrade as are a bit old...
Great reception with a nice cafe on site 😊
Best pool in Broome ☺️
Fantastic Caravan Park. Tropical pool and great temperature. Spacious caravan spots. Friendly staff and very clean.
Had a great time in a cabin little green frog came up to shower with me good food in cafe on site
Wunderbarer Pool! Campkitchen und BBQ sehr gepflegt, ebenso die sanitären Anlagen. Zum Strand nicht weit, allerdings keine Abkürzung quer durch. Sehr schattige Anlage, gerne wieder!

Camp site looked like a refugee camp/scrap yard.
The road kerbs are far to high with drops on both sides which will damage some vans.
No street lights wich makes trips to the tiolet in the dark precarious.
Pitches are left with branches strewn across the pitch heaps of leaves.No attempt what so ever to make the site look welcoming.We we moved after 2 nights to RAC cable beach same price but a world of differance.

老闆娘非常的熱情，詢問問題也很樂意回答，公共廁所和廚房非常乾淨，廚房有冷藏的冰箱、BBQ燒烤台、明火爐台、微波爐、氣炸鍋可以使用。
泳池有舒服的躺椅。
營區內安靜及安全。
我們是搭建帳篷，釘子需要找很多角度或換位置才能順利打進去，因為土地內有石頭會阻擋釘子。

Worst caravan park in the region. broom caravan park has a bigger and nicer pool, the ground at Cable beach is hard, the toilet blocks get closed without notice, and if u wanna do a shit the paper gets constantly jammed and only allows a single sheet at a time.. for double the price of Broome caravan park.. Cable beach isn’t worth it. Avoid at all costs in my opinion.. even when it’s quiet.. $45 a night for shite.. or $29 a night for great service and staff, pool, and amenities at Broome CP.. I’ll never come back to Cable Beach CP appalling..
Also the ground is like concrete they do noting to soften it.. I bent 7 tent pegs..
additionally the camp kitchen has used old rubbish everywhere… it’s a bit disgusting to be fair..

Visited in October so the weather was starting to warm up and get humid but we had a large shady powered site.|Staff are very helpful and the reception area and cafe present nicely.|The pool is huge and was a welcome relief to jump in to after a day of being out and about, nicely shaded too 👍🏼|Ablution blocks always seemed nice and clean and well spaced between the park areas.|Some of the roads are tight, so be warned if you have a large van and tow vehicle....

We stayed one night at Cable Beach Caravan Park with our tent and it was a really good experience. The bathrooms and camp kitchen were clean and tidy.
We were heading to Port Hedland the next day, and the two reception ladies were super kind. They told us about the road closure because of a bushfire and let us keep the access card until the official update at 12 pm. Unfortunately the road was still closed the next day and we had to leave because we needed a better internet connection for some personal paperwork.
Great service and friendly staff. We definitely recommend this place.
Excellent allround

When you drive from Darwin to Perth you have to make a detour to Cable Beach if only to see the camels 🐫
The caravan park is located perfectly to do everything you need to do.
Facilities are easily accessible and set up fantastically.
Good location to beach area.

Excellent campground with great shade,facilities and cool pool
Even better was the service from the lovely ladies at reception you have truly restored our faith in human nature 10 outa 10 from us
Fantastic place and staff is friendly and super helpful.

Noisy, flies and smells if you stay around sites 89-93. The workers start early and zoom around all day. The bin truck comes regularly, I know that is sensible, but it is very noisy and sometimes left close to vans with fermentation occurring in it

Stayed for a week at cable beach caravan park in August 2025. The park itself is very shady with good amenities. Millies cafe which is on site does an excellent breakfast but oddly does not open on Saturdays. The staff at reception are very friendly and helpful. Bathroon block very clean with plenty of hot water.

It would be 5 stars but for the small caravan/campervan sites. We had a powered campervan site but quite frankly we felt like we were on top of our neighbours. Also we were on sites next to campers in tents etc. Now this would generally not be a problem but most of the campers appeared to be backpackers working in the broome area. As a consequence vehicles next to us were coming and going late at night and early in the morning. Not brill when on holiday. It's not the backpackers fault, there should be a separate camping area.

Unfortunately I thought this place was a bit rough. Camping in the dirt, small streets, incorrect installation of sullige points (almost as high as the caravan water tanks and doesn't drain well) packed to the rafters. An arborist couldn't  hurt to clean up all the old low hanging tree branches etc. It was just "ok" in my personal opinion and smells like sullige, but the positive is - decent location close to the good stuff

The best caravan park in Broome! The girls in the office are absolutely incredible, it's almost like watching air traffic controllers at work!
Amenities are spot on, so clean and well maintained. The park is large, leafy and blissfully quiet at night. And...the pool is large and clean!  We
won't stay anywhere else in Broome. Love it!

Cable Beach Caravan Park is the best located park in Broome. The office staff are outstanding,  Millie’s Cafe is awesome and the sites are beautifully shady. A terrific place to chill out and enjoy the perfect climate from June to September.

Overall a good park however apart from being squeezed in like sardines, we were put into a site in front of the camp kitchen, operating hours as signed, 7am to 8pm.
Why have a bloody sign if you’re not going to police it, in the 8 nights we were there we were constantly woken by inconsiderate turn outs anywhere from 11 pm to 4.30am.
Brought this up with management who clearly couldn’t care less.
Great Park with 500 sites. Close to Cable Beach, a Brewery and a few more small shops. Loving it.
Sooo busy...but a perfect spot to investigate the whole area

Came for 1 night and stayed 2 weeks. Couldn't leave so kept booking a few extra days.This place is so relaxing, the pool is better than any resort I've been to including Crown Towers. It's a caravan park and I am sleeping on the back of our ute but feel like I'm in a gorgeous resort. Best pressure in the showers, shady beautiful trees, great big campers kitchen and the little ladies are always running around keeping it clean. Staff are fantastic, great cafe with yummy food.

Walk to cable beach. Bus out front to other parts of Broome. Onsite cafe 6 days. Happy they found us small site. Toilets bbq  etc very clean despite school holidays. Quiet at night. We have small van which helped secure site.
Our initial caravan site was small, difficult to access and surrounded by an untidy tent city. However, we spoke to reception and a better site was immediately made available and apologies profuse .
Worst position in park possible said there was WiFi there wasn't and telstra service bad. Driving thru Park with motorhome 3.5 metres high was ridiculous collecting all low low lying branches
kitchen small and dirty, all the amneties are pretty far but the coffee was good

Cable beach park at Broome is very large park with 3 exits. I would hate for there to be a fire….. you would never get out. Had very narrow roads for backing a caravan in. $80 a night for a powered site. Nice and shady though. Friendly staff and handy eatery.

We had to move to Cable Beach Caravan Park as we were delayed for caravan repairs. Very accomodating fitting in two vans for extras nights. At the last minute we didn’t need all the nights and Chris in the office was so helpful. Huge thankyou to Chris! |Large sites, we have a very large 24ft van without drawbar.

Quite nice caravan park with a lot of potential. Nice staff, cafe and pool as well as good distance to cable beach - but the kitchen and bathrooms were a bit dirty. There were dirty dishes in the sink in the kitchen. Also a lot of backpackers and people living there permanently. It was fairly quiet though.

Redelijke camping, erg duur, wild3n unpowerd place, niet mogelijk.
Je mag max 8 km per uur maar personeel scheurt als gekken met hun karretjes rond...  zij hoeven zich daar niet aan te houden??
Helaas erg veel auto verkeer op hele park. Wij hadden een kleine plek bij jeugd uit Frankrijk dat behoorlijk aan het wiet roken was,  dus totaal geen controle .....
Ook wij zijn jong geweest, maar nu in de 70 en dan ons plaatsen op zo'n plekje, jammer hoor. Er waren nog heel veel andere grotere plekken vrij.

Do not do your washing here, we had bought new bedding and clothes in Broome and they came out brown with dirt patches. After washing them at the laundromat, they are a bit better but still ruined. One of the toilets was blocked for our whole stay. They put everyone up the back where the amenities is small and no one down the front where the amenities is huge. I wouldn’t stay here again, for the price and there’s no maintenance getting done. Our neighbour had a boat, two cars and caravan overflowing onto our site and the oldies that stay here for the dry always walking through our site thinking they own the place, very uncomfortable
Great place and staff, we ended up staying an extra night. Walking distance to Cable beach and a few restaurants and pubs. Would definitely stay again.

Bon caravan park dans l'ensemble et prix assez raisonnable en temps normal par rapport aux autres campings mais nous n'avons jamais payé le même prix durant nos 2 séjours, (nous étions 2 avec un petit camper van et toujour avec électricité) parfois nous payons $54, parfois $52, puis $68 et durant la première semaine de juin s'est passé à $80 par nuit alors nous sommes partis dans le caravan park qu'il y a juste à côté "TARANGAU" où il une réduction spéciale de -$10 pour la première semaine de juin justement !! Il est plus petit mais aussi plus calme et des toilettes 3 étoiles avec petites musiques d'ambiance comme dans les grands restaurants ou aéroports.

À Cable Beach Caravan Park, le personnel était serviable toujours à l'écoute. Mais il n'y avait jamais de savon pour les mains aux toilettes, bien que le service de nettoyage était au top 👌, certains vacanciers ne faisaient pas l'effort d'effacer leur traces de freinage de pneu au fond des toilettes 🚻 mais bon ça c'est un manque d'éducation. La direction a fait l'effort d'imprimer des pancartes dans chaque toilettes
Top notch 👌

Amenities were clean. Reception staff great. It is a huge park, another pool would be great. It is where the seasonal workers stay, but they respected the park rules. Felt sorry for them in the 100mls of rain we had while there.

Not one to complain however this park should re named backpackers caravan park. Avoid staying in sites near the 300s as you will be surrounded by backpackers who leave rubbish everywhere for their entire stay attracting Ibis. They completely took over the camp kitchen with their food which stayed there the entire time we were there.  Multiple occasions I was at the showers/toilets with my two young daughters and men were in the women's showers, despite the men's showers being right next door. The showers and toilets never seemed to get cleaned, bandaids on the ground in the showers and dead cockroaches. Save yourself the hassle and go to the other two caravan parks down the road.
We stayed here 6 years ago and it was fine, Standards have dropped.
Can’t wait to come back
Great caravan park! Location fabulous and secure, amenities well maintained and clean. Staff very friendly and helpful. Half the price as caravan park on the bay and in Broome
A very shady park with great facilities and friendly, helpful staff.
Campingplätze und Anlage sollten renoviert werden. Liegen am Pool sehr alt. Spielplatz nicht erwähnenswert, dann lieber keinen als so einen. Kein WLAN. Nicht empfehlenswert!

We were passing through Broome for a few days and ended up staying two nights at this caravan park by chance – it turned out to be our little haven of peace!

The pool is fantastic and perfect for the hot days. The campsites are well maintained, spacious, and come with water and power.

The amenities – including showers and toilets – are clean and plentiful. The staff are super friendly and welcoming.

All in all, we highly recommend this great campground, whether you’re just passing through or staying in Broome a bit longer!
Great park, with pool very clean amenities as well as a good size camp kitchen

Not far from beach you can walk about 10min to beach for sunset
Swiming pool so clean and Good for family span time together.

every caravan park needs a "Todd" - what an absolute legend! I was hot, tired and cranky due to power going out during the night and the number of kids that were bombing the pool so couldn't enjoy it at all!  I don't mind kids - have my own, but wish some parents would teach them NOT to jump so close to others...
Next day hubby mentioned the power to Todd who was awesome! moved us to another site, helped us move, followed up to see how we were doing - turned our whole stay around

Can no longer walk thru the adjacent property to access cable beach so it's a long walk. Sites are very small. A lot of the sites are filled with people who live here permanently and built steel structures over their caravan.  No wifi.  Lot of greenery with well established trees and nice pool.

Absolutely awesome facilities and camp sites that are well priced and very nicely maintained. The pool is awesome for summer days and you're also a short walk to cable beach. Both receptionists and all staff were lovely to talk with and very knowledgeable about the area 😁. Can't recommend this place enough if it's for long term stays or even for the passing through traveler to reset, this place jokingly became our little home in Broome ❤️
Stayed in caravan park bloody awesome

Nice shade, friendly staff,  but dusty gravel sites, permanent residents noisy with cars coming out going all hours,  permanent sites an eyesore and one staff starts raking leaves at 6am around our camp!|Cut our stay as we expected a bit more peace and quiet!

Loved our time here.  Large, shady site for our motor home.   Excellent on site cafe and great pool.  The staff are friendly and obliging.  Deb in the office is a star - she booked several trips/activities for us and was very helpful.  Walking distance to many Cable Beach restaurants. Couldn’t recommend this park more highly.   Wish our stay was longer.
Sehr schöner Campingplatz mit tollen alten Bäumen, guten Sanitäreinrichtungen und schönem Pool. Das Frühstück war sehr lecker. Zum Strand konnte man gut zu Fuß gehen.
Enjoyed our stay here easy access to town and Cable Beach. Massive park with 450 sites, very well organised, lovely pool just very cold 🥶 Cafe/ Coffee shop was perfect.

Lovely staff and good  location to the beach within walk distance however you can hire umbrellas and chairs for the day.
We had dinner at Cable Beach House which was lovely and large serves.
The only negative is the sites are very hard to get into and small With narrow paths.  Very busy and the amenities were clean and a little outdated.

Large sites. Amazing pool.
Short drive or walk to Cable Beach.

👍Handy to Cable Beach. Great, accommodating staff. Quiet at night.
👎Overcrowded, with vehicles spilling onto driveways. Camp kitchen seems unchanged since 20years ago. Old amenities, not very clean.
Expensive, with small sites charged same as large. Greedy.

Spent 4 days here from Monday 22nd July 2024 in our caravan.  We loved the park from the minute we arrived.  The lovely ladies in reception were very welcoming and informative.  The amenities were always clean and tidy, despite it being very busy.  The camp kitchen looked to be adequate with everything you would need.  The pool is just amazing, one of the best I’ve seen in a caravan park, and it was so clean.  The park is extremely large and busy, but we found the sites to be of adequate size.  I think they do try to accomodate the size of your van.  The streets can be a bit narrow and can be a bit hard to manoeuvre your van, but it’s not that bad.  The beach is within easy walk, about 8 minutes and the cafe ( Millie’s) had great coffee and meals.  It only took about 5 minutes to drive into town.   This is our second time here and we will definitely return again.  We found the park to be very reasonably priced.

Worst park we have stayed in. Squeezing people in like sardines, too many long term tenants and backpackers taking up and overtaking amenities and bush kitchen. Quite smelly around those areas and no doubt attracting vermin with all their rubbish shoved under and around old vehicles and living areas. Extremely dusty and smelly, as way too many vehicles in and out all day and night. Water leaking constantly everywhere. Very small caravan sites and for tents it is even worse. Stuck on ends of blocks dangerously close to kerbs. Gutters and kerbs are way too high and make it difficult to navigate vehicles onto the lots. Millie’s Cafe is the only good thing going for that place. Still a fair distance from the beach, which is always overcrowded at sunset. Paying one of the highest rates on our journey, expected a bit more for our money. First time in Broome and very disappointed.

An awesome park with very, very helpful staff/owners who helped my husband and myself recently. We were in an emergency situation and everyone here went above and beyond what they needed to do to help out. I cannot thank them enough. The park is immaculate in its appearance and facilities and very close to the beach and surrounding bars/eateries. Hit the jackpot when we stayed here.

We had 6 weeks in the caravan park over the last 3 months and had a great time.
It is a credit to Ron and his staff, to mention a few, Claudio and Noel, Sara, Shane and Katey in cafe and Jane and Tara at front office. They went over and above their time and pay rate  for us and made our stay the best in all WA/Kimberley.
Only thing to really say negative which didn’t effect our stay, was an elderly  white haired woman, who didn’t seem to have any role anywhere in the park over our stay, laying down the law to cafe staff for no apparent reason, and the look on the staff was one of confusion. The quality of the service didn’t alter so it was business as usual anyway.
Thanks again Ron and especially staff mentioned. Ash and Sue

Amazing caravan park! We were travelling along the Gibb when we lost our back window and Tyers and needed to check into Broome 3 days earlier then expected, the caravan park we had our booking with couldn’t get us in earlier then our expected date, but cable beach was able to make things work for us for those 3 days we needed…. The park was absolutely packed being school holidays and usually the time to travel to Broome but somehow they managed to get us and our friends in, on sites right next to each other! The facilities were clean and the park overall was beautiful! If I had of known about this park earlier I 110% would have booked there then where we originally booked, after the 3 days we spent there I definitely did not want to check out and move to another park….
Fantastic! Friendly staff who went above & beyond to help us, as we didn’t have a booking. Facilities were clean, our site was large & shady, great location. Highly recommend
Excellent stop over, massive park, good toilets,showers,laundry walking distance to brewery, cable beach, beam bikes outside.

You would think for $73 per site per night that they would have immaculate amenities, maybe even some wifi and a computer system for their bookings…. But the amenities are very dated, there’s no wifi considering Broome itself has horrible service and even tho we rang twice in advance to book a site for 2 nights they couldn’t organise anything until the mornings of so after our first night we had to re book at reception and move sites because they couldn’t figure out how to shuffle people around. Probably one of the biggest rip off caravan parks I’ve ever stayed at.

Best Caravan Park in Broome , The girls in the office are just so friendly  and  fantastic as are the staff  in Millys Cafe,  Regarding the Power outage nothing could be done about that 65 mls of rain was great to watch. Ron is a fair bloke and will help if you need it as we found out when our sprinkler came on while having a wine at night . Have stayed  at this park numerous  times and cannot  fault it .

Emplacements ombragés super, magnifique piscine (un peu froide malgré tout), des sanitaires propres, ... Tout a été parfait ! (Et bien meilleur que le RAC juste à côté, que nous avons quitté pour celui ci).

This is a great caravan park that allows early check in and is well maintained. The only real gripe I have after 7 nights is the constant noise of staff quads driving around park during daylight hours starting early. Staff do a great job of maintaining park but maybe look at purchasing electric golf carts to reduce noise levels. Have stayed in numerous parks that have these vehicles .
It's busy at this time of year 🌴🌞everyone escaping the cold weather in the southern states.The staff are friendly & helpful 🙋‍♀️👍nice pool 💙 not too far from cable Beach ⛱️enjoy your stay

We dealt with Danielle, she was very helpful and arranged a drive thru site as we are first time travellers and this made our set up east. Park is nicely shaded with plenty of green trees. Would highly recommend. Regards John (Kevin) & Caz
It’s a lovely friendly shaded park. Great pool with good clean amenities. Excellent position to the beach and restaurants.

Der Inhaber war so unfreundlich, welcher schon zu viel Geld mit dem Standort verdient hat. Bei uns sagen wir der Kunde ist König, was dieser Inhaber noch nie gehört hat. Ich habe ganz freundlich etwas gefragt weil ich es nicht verstanden habe. Daraufhin sagte er mir wenn es dir nicht passt kannst du gehen. Ich würde nicht wieder in diesen Park gehen. Sehr sehr unfreundlich wie kann man nur so sein.

Absolut unfreundlicher Manager. Wir haben ganz normal gefragt wieso man pro Kopf und nicht pro Campingplatz bezahlt und die Antwort war: „Wenn es euch nicht passt dann geht doch!“. Das geht gar nicht…

Allgemein Renovierungsbedürftige Duschblöcke aber suber und ok.

Very disappointed. Don't expect any customer care.

We came in for two nights bc we needed power and wanted to do laundry. 1h after set up the power in half the park went out. I went to the reception after lunch the next day, asking when power was coming on again. They said they don't know for sure. After politely expressing my dissatisfaction, and trying to find a solution (we wouldn't have stayed if we knew it had no power), they became very unfriendly. We got told, we should leave, if we don't like it.
Never experienced such a rude behavior after almost completing a full lap.

Also don't camp here if it's raining. The park is completely flooded.

In the end paid 65$ for a flooded unpowered site per night.
Great place to stay, shadey, great pool, did the job.
Great camping location. Easy walk to Cable Beach. Lots of large shady trees make this an excellent camping spot on hot days. The pool is brilliant and amenities are fine, huge camp kitchen.

Beau camping ombragé. Magnifique piscine. Bon accueil, tres bon entretien du camping. Les points négatifs sont ma laverie un peu chère, 6 dollars une machine qui lave uniquement froid et le peu de sanitaires disponibles pour le nombres d'emplacement et donc tres vite souillés
Nous étions près de la kitchenette.
Very joyful place
Good location

This is a fabulous park.   Jane and Margy who run reception are fabulous and make you feel like 'family'.  Millie's Café (next to the reception desk) serves delicious and quite reasonably priced food and drinks.  And the pool is resort style.  It's convenient to Cable Beach and the shuttle bus into town.  Overall, it was a great 2.week stay.

What a find! We stayed for 4 nights on a powered site recently (end of April school holidays). We were greeted with fun, friendly customer service in the office. The park is huge and luckily for us it wasn't peak season so there was a lot of space with trees everywhere. The facilities are great and the pool is one of the best pools ever (really!!).  Only a short walk to Cable Beach with those magic sunsets...where else would you stay if you were camping in Broome? Big thanks to the friendly staff who made us feel very welcome. See you next time!
Magnifique camping avec une superbe piscine. Tout est très propre et entretenu. Les propriétaires sont extraordinairement gentils, accueillants et à l'écoute. Je ne peux que recommander ce camping.
I recommend this caravan park not only for the location but the friendly staff. Amenities and kitchen are alright and the camp site is mostly under three which is great during hot days.
Great staff, big sites
I go there every year. Love the place, secure and top facilities. Good friendly service and close to the beach.

What a fantastic park. We rang at short notice due to unforeseeable circumstances and they were extremely welcoming and accommodating. Fabulous reception staff. Nothing was a problem for them, and very welcoming. Very clean amenities, and great, well equipped camp kitchen. The Cafe is excellent and very reasonably priced as well. We would not hesitate recommending this fantastic park, and we will definitely be back without hesitation. Thank you so much. 😀
Stayed at the caravan park in a Motorhome great park excellent pool and close to cable beach bus stops right out the front into the town

Cable Beach Caravan Park: Despite being mostly sold out, we managed to snag a last-minute spot, albeit more of a shoulder than a proper site. It served its purpose for a night, but cleanliness was lacking. Onsite restaurant and cafe were convenient, although unexpectedly closed on Saturdays.
We stayed in our caravan. The park was beautiful and well looked after.

A big more than your normal caravan park, in my opinion. Most of the sites are with ample shade, reception has a bistro cafe and some excellent souvenirs and the staff was very friendly and helpful. The pool is a very welcome refreshing amenity I enjoyed a lot! Early morning you get treated by a fair bit of wildlife in and around the park

Nice park shady caravan park - only caravan sites. Good size pool. Small walking distance to cable beach.
Staff very friendly & accommodating.
- have a small Cafe but we didn't eat there although extremely busy little place.
Enjoyed our stop here.
(Thank you to the understanding & helpful staff with our predicament with our caravan, we greatly appreciate it)

I was so disappointed with our experience at Cable Beach Caravan Park, mainly because of the appalling customer service we received. The reception staff were unhelpful when managing our bookings using their outdated “system” of handwritten notes and became hostile and aggressive when we politely questioned a duplicate payment.
The park contains over 500 sites which are tightly packed. Considering the size of the park, and the large itinerant population, there needs to be more than one camp kitchen, and the facilities desperately need upgrading (one sink, two stove burners, one working bbq plate).
We liked the location of the park as it was walking distance to Cable Beach.
Great caravan park,  staff we friendly and helpful.  Good location to Cable Beach.  Large shady sites. Nice pool to cool off in. Would definitely stay here again.
A good place to stay. Big caravan site, good and clean toilet and showers, and the pool is big. 👌👍
Packed in with no room to pass another car. Very tight.

Extremely shady park which is why we come. Very nice pool and other facilities but playground is small, run down and is not usable for young children. As a result we left the park for much of the day. The team here are always very professional and friendly.

Pretty disappointing experience at cable beach caravan park to say the least.

Charged $70 per night for a "powered" site. Patch of dirt in front of the maintenance shed with no power or water to be found. After talking to reception thinking they'd over charged us, it became instantly apparent they'd hidden the power and water on the side of the shed out of sight. Wouldn't have been a problem if they had let us know at check in lol

Not one to leave bad reviews but after the "ohhh yeahhhh sorry" from reception and being ushered out the door, I thought it was worth my time.

What a scam lol
Pretty average but way too expensive. Facilities not always clean.
Great breakfast and ☕️
Great park, perfect location and the staff are very helpful 👍
Just went in to visit friends in the park. The place is massive. Goes on forever. Very nice hardly used pool.  However it is unseasonally cold we are told.
Wow. Lots of sites (500) and lots of people ( we were in peek week), but it was great! Fabulous service from the ladies. Short walk to beach, tavern, shop and cafes
Spacious shaded sites
Just rang to find out about dates and spoke to a very rude person
Fantastic caravan park good facilities nice Cafe very centrally located
Very dusty, overpriced, nothing special

Great customer service. The ladies in that office are outstanding. Welcoming, friendly and will do everything they can to make your stay enjoyable. Excellent location. Clean facilities. Good pool. Well kept even sites. Shady. Noisy at front of park but quiet at back. Pool in the middle. Great cafe in Reception.

The best & safest Caravan park to stay in Broome, we loved the hot showers, shade literally everywhere, beautiful plants and birds and will really miss the beautiful pool! Some Improvements would be gates for walk-ins to make it even safer
Tried to ring for a pitch, was really rude over the phone, saying I wouldn’t be able to afford their prices! They made up a price on the spot

Stayed on a powered site early June, what a beautiful park, loved it, beautiful trees and garden, well maintained trees, I felt so relaxed in this park, loved the vibe, the pool and will be back and highly recommend.😊
Beautiful park. A bit pricey, but everything in Broome is.

Absolutely loved our stay here. Lots of beautiful big trees, massive pool, decent facilities, and such a relaxed vibe around. It felt like home, the staff were friendly, the bins emptied daily, a nice quiet caravan park. Would definitely recommend to anyone, very family friendly. Only one thing; the playground could do with a a makeover 😅
Lovely friendly warm service and great coffees
